name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: You have to see these photos from our biggest weekend of action for Beto EVER:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I just sat down for a breath in the middle of this epic weekend of action
to ‘get out the vote’ for Beto so I could share this quick note with
you.

Thousands of volunteers across Texas are hitting the phones and knocking
on doors at a rate I’ve never seen before -- and many are out talking to
voters even in the rain. Just look:

[1]Beto for Texas

[2]Beto for Texas

[3]Beto for Texas

[4]Beto for Texas

[5]Beto for Texas

[6]Beto for Texas

[7]Beto for Texas

[8]Beto for Texas

If we keep up our current pace all day, we can hit our incredibly steep
goals. With only one week until early voting starts, we can’t afford to
take a break. We need to knock a huge number of doors to push Beto to
victory.

October 20-21 is our last weekend before the start of Early Vote, so we’re
more than doubling our goals for another massive weekend of action to
elect Beto. Together, we plan to hit 150,000 doors and make 1 million
calls.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=ema20181014&t=1001&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc ]Can you help by signing up to come back to Texas during the final few
weeks of the election? I know it’s a lot to ask, but knocking on doors and
talking directly with Texas voters is the best way to make an impact.
Every single volunteer on the ground here in Texas makes a world of
difference.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=ema20181014&t=1002&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc ]Come to Texas »

If you can’t make it, we understand! Another way you can help is by
gathering people in your community to make calls to Texas voters.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=em20181014&t=1003&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc ]Can you help by hosting a phone bank for Beto in your community? Our
organizing team will provide you with all the tools and support you need
to host a successful event.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=em20181014&t=1004&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc ]Host a phone bank »

I couldn’t be prouder of this team. Every time that we set a goal, we
don’t just meet it. We blow past it. Our campaign just raised the most
money in a quarter by a Senate campaign, ever. We’re in the midst of the
largest ‘get out the vote’ effort that Texas has ever seen. We’re breaking
records across the board -- and it’s all thanks to people just like you.
No PACs.

But everything comes down to this final sprint. Eleven outside groups have
pledged to spend millions in Texas to elect Ted Cruz. Whether we win or
lose will depend on if enough of us do the work now -- whether we knock on
every door, and complete every door-knocking shift.

If you thought this weekend was huge... well, next weekend needs to be even
bigger. It will take all of us digging deep, but together we can do it.

Onward!

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=ema20181014&t=1005&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc ]DONATE
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181015footer&t=1006&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=18272%2E444211%2E01DWfc

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:

name: Polling Update
subject: Democrat tied with right-wing extremist Dana Rohrabacher in Orange County!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Please rush a secure donation to help us take lead and flip this seat!
**New Poll of CA-48:**
**Rouda (D) 48%**
**Rohrabacher (R) 48%**

**[Donate to help us defeat Dana Rohrabacher and flip a critical seat from red to blue>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181014_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
* * *
Peter,

The road to taking back the House on November 6 runs right through California's 48th District. The district was carried by Hillary Clinton, but it's represented by Republican Dana Rohrabacher. Rohrabacher was caught on camera this summer saying that children as young as four should be taught how to use firearms, and he's rubber-stamped every bit of the Trump agenda.

**A new poll from UC Berkeley now has Rohrabacher TIED with his Democratic challenger, Harley Rouda.**

This race is too close to call, and we cannot take anything for granted. Conservative dark money groups are spending millions of dollars in districts like this. We need to make sure Harley Rouda can fight back for every one of the last 23 days of this election.

**Linda 's lending her hand to help Rouda -- and she needs your help too!** We're aiming to raise an emergency $2,300 for Rouda from our grassroots team by tomorrow.
**[Please rush a secure contribution so Rouda can defeat Rohrabacher!](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181014_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181014_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
With just over three weeks to go, we don't even need to tell you that Election Day is right around the corner.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120391e/2fde7c66/49bdb20a/156876fc/27690335/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_BTM_deadline3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

23 days, Friend.

That's all that's left until one of the most consequential elections in our state's history.

This election is going to come down to one thing: turnout. The only way we're successful is if our grassroots team can get folks to the polls on November 6th. The only way to make that happen is to make sure we have the resources to keep our team going.

**That's why we're asking you now: will you chip in before our Wednesday fundraising deadline? We set a goal of raising $50,000 before the deadline -- anything you can give now helps:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120391e/2fde7c66/49bdb20a/156876ff/27690335/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")

[ ](nh.gop)
**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**SUNDAY, OCTOBER 14th**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
New Hampshire Republicans are leading and offering ideas. New Hampshire Democrats are becoming a mob.
Democrats, from Eric Holder to Michael Avenatti and failed presidential candidate Hillary Clinton, [are calling on their left-wing base to commit acts of violence and be uncivil towards Republicans. ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyHLyvuEsfiWR6B-2BAHNJs4qrsLsIPC-2BBse2aOMuRXCHF3c6UQ4nNHDiLCGAITkaUzVg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M4FmdOyJBy6vlsH8UQLTzf76B4hyv0miXxmR4fm-2FXfi2QlyrlqnsGMiGPoZOyNuL1hnrItngWAAE7bAHJzYNk6pKZ1KAqX3g5aDc376dBtDL-2Bo3oK9CvRx1Vtiuhl7Mae2W5XvqwUvlRug135h0-2BrIxOjERd2JVJaAwlbEFkccEetnQV-2FiPthZ6u-2BUOH6efhVsg-2FYeYPcAZjiXHUt5Rgr2dDJ8xCq9ppACEzqEJexKsQjChh8HUcY0bZLQjPt7Vrw1iRPgfFzekz6QYrvWC5vzw-3D-3D)
This is absurd. New Hampshire voters will not accept this belligerent and dangerous rhetoric.
We need your help, however. If New Hampshire Democrats win this November, this new behavior will be normalized.
[Join our volunteer team](nh.gop/action), if you haven't already, to help defeat Democrats at the polls, and support Governor Chris Sununu, Eddie Edwards, Steve Negron, and our entire Republican ticket this November.
23 days to go. Let's continue the good work we've been doing and secure the victory!
Sincerely,
Wayne MacDonald
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

New Hampshire Democrats are becoming a mob. Democrats, from Eric Holder to Michael Avenatti and failed presidential candidate Hillary Clinton, This is absurd. New Hampshire voters will not accept this belligerent and dangerous rhetoric. We need your help, however. If New Hampshire Democrats win this November, this new behavior will be normalized. nh.gop/action, if you haven't already, to help defeat Democrats at the polls, and support Governor Chris Sununu, Eddie Edwards, Steve Negron, and our entire Republican ticket this November. 23 days to go. Let's continue the good work we've been doing and secure the victory! Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. name: Bill Nelson
subject: 5:00 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Here's the deal, Friends:**Senate control will be decided by who wins in Florida. And right now, we're being wildly outspent.**
Tea Party Gov. Rick Scott has personally given his own campaign $26 million, and GOP megadonors have helped bombard Florida nonstop on TV with millions on top of that!
Senate control is on the line here, Friends - **and losing Florida could cost Democrats the Senate, so we need to close the gap.**
We need to raise $50,000 before 5:00 p.m. TODAY to keep our ads on the air, but we're still $22,500 short. **If we miss this goal, we could lose this race and Democrats won't take back the Senate. So I'm counting on you to give right now:**
**[Please, rush $5 or more now- everything you can before our critical deadline - to keep our ads on the air so we can defeat Scott, protect Florida's Senate seat and take back the Senate!](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk905-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for all you do,
Bill
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk905-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Justin Jones
subject: Dave Brat Said That...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Good Morning Peter,

Despite numerous and widely circulated interviews and statements from our campaign, Congressman Brat continues to make wildly inaccurate and easily debunked claims about where Abigail stands on a variety of issues.

This is nothing new, and everything we have come to expect from an opponent more interested in scaring his constituents than representing them.

But as Abigail says on TV: "I'm not afraid to stand up to political attack ads, and the bullies behind them." So in advance of the VA07 Debate tonight in Culpeper, we're setting the record straight, and encouraging you to help us fact check.

Below you will find a list of false claims Rep. Brat has repeatedly made about Abigail's positions and background, alongside Abigail's actual positions and additional citations. The list draws from Brat's ads, emails, interviews, and social media where he is more than comfortable making misleading statements, despite being publicly corrected multiple times.

We felt it was necessary to share the facts while providing the people of the 7th District a clear understanding of where Abigail stands, free from the innuendo, spin, and falsehoods being peddled by our opponent.

Whether you're watching in person, on [TV](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/IkMMj0R-lpGjnbt8oM9_a3T4EKxBnS9e_MWlU_-CQNU=), or [online](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/IkMMj0R-lpGjnbt8oM9_a3T4EKxBnS9e_MWlU_-CQNU=), use the list below to correct any false claims mentioned during the debate by posting on social media with the hashtags #DaveBratSaidThat and #VA07Debate.

Thank you for helping us set the record straight!

Justin Jones
_Communications Director
Spanberger for Congress_

Congressman Brat's False and Misleading Claims

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She supports a $32 trillion single-payer healthcare proposal.
As Abigail has stated publicly numerous times, she does not support the current single-payer plan before Congress. She has spoken on multiple occasions about her support for a public option called Medicare X, which would provide Virginians with more choices and more affordable care, while still covering pre-existing conditions. In fact, a public option is assessed to create cost savings for the federal government. A [2013 Congressional Budget Office](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/TGcqV-_zDvs8V2N_PYH2lkY1KfKaFbFU_eKh6TN1F0M=) report estimated that a public option insurance plan would save the federal government $158 billion.
"Congressman Brat is not listening on that. Healthcare is the number one concern that people raise. The single-payer bill that is currently before Congress is not one that I currently support, (Brat) says that I do, he clearly is not listening to what I talk about."
[Richmond2Day](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/HCf_fsJTejtjNzG6uiDMHsRQ5KiMBP-17WBB_9Jgd4E=), 8/22/18

"In her campaign office in Henrico County, Spanberger rattled off to USA TODAY the list of Democratic policies she's against: a government-run single-payer health care system..."
[USA TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/krXCxhxasZ5157U0XGKxp-wMHkACeOLMEnCsRuFZF6Q=), 8/23/18

"I don't support Bernie Sanders' plan."
[The John Fredericks' Radio Show](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/XhUKcbohwi-g0PbVZrt52_rcmdzK0xmavR4O-oRNHds=?v=DiKRAVCqguA), 10/4/18

"she says she is opposed to sanctuary cities and supports a health-care plan that differs from the one Brat describes. Spanberger says she wants "Medicare X," a plan proposed by Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) that would offer Medicare as an option on the health-insurance exchanges for non-elderly Americans. People could buy into a publicly provided insurance plan using the network of Medicare providers, at similar rates."
[Washington Post](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/iu_oLiL3Fm0MqoTER3jNXheyoz7SinQua2sItvQrzYQ=?utm_term=.c155d9c1a5d7), 10/8/18

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She switched from supporting single-payer to Medicare X after single-payer was judged to cost $32 trillion by the Richmond Times-Dispatch in August 2018.
Abigail has been supportive of Medicare X since nearly the beginning of her campaign. In January 2018, she stated, "I am a big supporter of a proposal called Medicare X and that's a public option proposal which is different than a single-payer option."
"I am a big supporter of a proposal called Medicare X and that's a public option proposal which is different than a single-payer option. Studies related in this proposal do show that there would be significant cost savings because there is already the infrastructure built behind implementing it."
[Powhatan County Democratic Committee Meeting,](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/XhUKcbohwi-g0PbVZrt52_rcmdzK0xmavR4O-oRNHds=?v=UbpXAClcUw8&feature=youtu.be) 1/31/18

"We need to look at how we can expand additional access to other Americans and other Virginians. I agree with Dan on this point in Sen. Kaine's Medicare X"
[Nottoway Forum](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/XhUKcbohwi-g0PbVZrt52_rcmdzK0xmavR4O-oRNHds=?v=Owq5mjgXHts&feature=youtu.be), 3/11/18

"If elected, she said she would support automatic enrollment in the program in addition to a public option for Medicare, called Medicare X, as has been proposed by U.S. Senator Tim Kaine."
[Fredericksburg.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/K-lyX7Slu6T2JBRZlw6N9sF5iZAXCt0kKmjGhIufH48=), 5/14/18

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She will vote to repeal the GOP tax cuts.
Abigail believes the tax bill was fiscally irresponsible because it added $1.9 trillion to the deficit and benefited only the wealthiest corporations, not middle-income Virginians. The tax bill was a mistake but she is not advocating for a full repeal or one set path forward because both sides of the aisle need to come to the table to discuss common-sense tax reform. She believes we will grow the economy when we invest in education, job training, and support small businesses.
"I'm not advocating for one a full repeal or one set path forward because honestly, I think it needs to be a discussion where people come to the table but I do think this tax cut was a mistake... we had promises that the growth in the economy would offset the deficit that we've that we've had it and in fact those projections are not holding true."
[The John Fredericks's Radio Show](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/XhUKcbohwi-g0PbVZrt52_rcmdzK0xmavR4O-oRNHds=?v=0D9MvTXNiY0), 6/28/18

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She wants open borders.
As a former federal law enforcement and CIA officer who worked to keep our country safe, Abigail is not for open borders and will advocate for border security policies that use cutting edge technology, together with trained officers and physical infrastructure to ensure our nation's security at our borders and points of entry.
"I am not for open borders. I am a former CIA officer, I am a former federal agent, I used to work drug cases and most of the drugs on cases I worked entered this country along the southern border. When I was with the CIA, I worked terrorism and counter-narcotic cases and we put a strong focus on how people entered the country and what risks might be posed by people entering this country. I am certainly not for open borders, but I am for smart legislation and being truthful about what threats we actually are facing. That means what are the issues that we are trying to address and how can we address them completely. That means ensuring our border is secure, but how do we do that - and what are we effectively trying to stop? When we talk about the border are we talking about just the southern border or other points of entry across the country where people are arriving on airplanes. I think the conversation has become oversimplified to this place where it's open borders or no open borders. I think it is lost, not even nuanced, but lost as far as any actual intelligent thought on how it is we can address border safety and ensure that we are keeping this country safe without making something as fundamental as the security of our country a political punching bag."
[Richmond2Day](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/HCf_fsJTejtjNzG6uiDMHsRQ5KiMBP-17WBB_9Jgd4E=), 8/22/18

"Spanberger, a former CIA officer and considered a moderate, said she opposes open borders and abolishing ICE."
[The Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/R6VjtOHZwxwQd9UUSpIBD-YqFk-j_Rx33kwN0mEeQUk=), 9/4/18

"I am not in favor of open borders, remember I worked drug-trafficking and terrorism with C.I.A. and terrorism. Conflating border security with immigration issues is an oversimplification, and it's a way to foment fear. We can have strong borders, and well-monitored borders and they are things we should prioritize. But that doesn't mean that anyone who wants to come to this country has ill-intent."
[North of the James](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/mlc_bcnUKifm42psIHj0D47UHk_6edEwAnoaLnwzi3w=), 10/11/18

"I will advocate for border security policies that use cutting edge technology, together with trained officers and physical infrastructure to ensure our nation's security at our borders and points of entry."
[Abigail Spanberger Campaign Site](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/Xx5uft8-7zJF4Z21MEMJ5df3i3vtdQU3eeChHUoooJY=)

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She supports sanctuary cities.
As a former federal agent, Abigail Spanberger opposes any efforts to create safe havens for violent criminals. America's immigration system is broken, and both parties continue to play politics instead of working together to fix the problem.
"As a former federal agent, I oppose any efforts to create safe havens for violent criminals."
[Abigail Spanberger Campaign Site](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/Xx5uft8-7zJF4Z21MEMJ5df3i3vtdQU3eeChHUoooJY=)

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She wants to abolish I.C.E.
Abigail Spanberger does not support eliminating I.C.E[.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/HCf_fsJTejtjNzG6uiDMHsRQ5KiMBP-17WBB_9Jgd4E=) as the problem lies with bad policy and worse politicians. She will work with anyone to create a proposal for immigration reform that ensures border security and creates an earned pathway to legal status for undocumented immigrants living here as long as they abide by the law, work hard, and pay taxes.
"I do not support abolishing I.C.E. It seems like a natural reaction to get rid of the entity that is taking these horrific actions - it is actually a problem of policy. Under ICE, the Homeland Security Investigations (HSI), they do really good work on child exploitation, human trafficking, drug trafficking, and I think that is a component that people don't talk about. But overall, the egregious offenses that we are seeing on the television - those are policy decisions. We need people who are committed to changing the policy. There might be issues with who is working there as well, but overall, addressing what we have seen in child separation, is a policy questions I think abolishing an entire agency is reactive and won't allow us to protective our southern border."
[Richmond2Day](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/HCf_fsJTejtjNzG6uiDMHsRQ5KiMBP-17WBB_9Jgd4E=), 8/22/18

"Spanberger, a former CIA officer and considered a moderate, said she opposes open borders and abolishing ICE."
[The Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/R6VjtOHZwxwQd9UUSpIBD-YqFk-j_Rx33kwN0mEeQUk=), 9/4/18

CONGRESSMAN BRAT CLAIMS: She will vote to support Nancy Pelosi.
Abigail would not support Nancy Pelosi for Speaker, under any circumstances.
"Under no circumstances, would I vote for Nancy Pelosi to again be Speaker of the House."
[NBC News](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/Nsq-tfK2dsueWhZ4_7tKfTW7AcgO7YobPaSocqTnWRs=), 7/31/18

"I would not support Nancy Pelosi for Speaker, under any circumstances."
[Richmond2Day](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/HCf_fsJTejtjNzG6uiDMHsRQ5KiMBP-17WBB_9Jgd4E=), 8/11/18

"We need new leadership in Washington, on both sides of the aisle ... under no circumstances would I vote for Nancy Pelosi to again be speaker of the House."
[NY Times](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/g4KZ-fDT76RkiBsw34iX_bRZC43N5oSiz5P_R-RMq30=), 9/16/18

"Spanberger said she has to counter Brat's accusations "time and time again," reiterating she doesn't back Pelosi for Speaker or the far-left policies she's tied to."
[USA Today](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/krXCxhxasZ5157U0XGKxp-wMHkACeOLMEnCsRuFZF6Q=), 9/23/18

Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer and the Democratic nominee running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit[ AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/rWdAOU7hwkRlHM4nb9PkOWzyqtpH3naKAnHzqHxCD9w=/RcmSM1FEFIN5Pg9jNW8Ml4Ii1HQEjNhBQd4_nuHCtgk=).

But as Abigail says on TV: "I'm not afraid to stand up to political attack ads, and the bullies behind them." So in advance of the VA07 Debate tonight in Culpeper, we're setting the record straight, and encouraging you to help us fact check. Below you will find a list of false claims Rep. Brat has repeatedly made about Abigail's positions and background, alongside Abigail's actual positions and additional citations. The list draws from Brat's ads, emails, interviews, and social media where he is more than comfortable making misleading statements, despite being publicly corrected multiple times. Thank you for helping us set the record straight! As Abigail has stated publicly numerous times, she does not support the current single-payer plan before Congress. She has spoken on multiple occasions about her support for a public option called Medicare X, which would provide Virginians with more choices and more affordable care, while still covering pre-existing conditions. In fact, a public option is assessed to create cost savings for the federal government. A = report estimated that a public option insurance plan would save the federal government $158 billion. "Congressman Brat is not listening on that. Healthcare is the number one concern that people raise. The single-payer bill that is currently before Congress is not one that I currently support, (Brat) says that I do, he clearly is not listening to what I talk about." =, 8/22/18 "In her campaign office in Henrico County, Spanberger rattled off to USA TODAY the list of Democratic policies she's against: a government-run single-payer health care system..." =, 8/23/18 "I don't support Bernie Sanders' plan." , 10/4/18 "she says she is opposed to sanctuary cities and supports a health-care plan that differs from the one Brat describes. Spanberger says she wants "Medicare X," a plan proposed by Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) that would offer Medicare as an option on the health-insurance exchanges for non-elderly Americans. Abigail has been supportive of Medicare X since nearly the beginning of her campaign. subject: President Trump Welcomes Home Freed American Pastor Andrew Brunson
body:
| |
---
#
# **_President Trump Welcomes Home Freed American Pastor Andrew Brunson_**
#
“President Trump on Saturday welcomed home American pastor Andrew Brunson, who was freed from Turkey, saying it was a satisfying end to a ‘long journey,’” S.A. Miller reports in _The Washington Times_. Mr. Brunson, who spent almost two years detained in Turkey, "thanked Mr. Trump for fighting for him and his family. ‘You really fought for us, incredibly so,’ said Mr. Brunson, who was accompanied in the Oval Office by his wife Norine and two of their three children." [**Click here to read more**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/13/donald-trump-welcomes-andrew-brunson-turkey/) [_**The Wall Street Journal**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/freedom-for-an-american-hostage-1539385634) editorial board writes that after being unjustly imprisoned by Turkey, American pastor Andrew Brunson has returned home. “On Friday a Turkish court convicted Mr. Brunson on unsupported terrorism charges, yet sentenced him to time served. This leniency was purportedly for good behavior, but more likely a response to U.S. pressure.” “America cannot be great if no one takes us seriously. The good news is that President Trump is making other countries respect us again, which is why leaders from around the world, allies and competitors alike, are lining up to negotiate with him,” retired senior intelligence operations officer Tony Shaffer writes in [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://thehill.com/opinion/white-house/411254-trump-shows-peace-through-strength-works-after-obama). “Now is the time for criminal justice reform, and President Trump is the man to do it,” the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/editorials/trump-sees-that-being-tough-on-crime-requires-being-smart-on-crime) editorial board writes. President Trump, “more than any recent president, has talked about battling crime. Today, he sees prison reform as part of that approach. Let's hope Congress gets a bill to his desk so that he can redefine what it means to be ‘tough on crime.’” “File this one under ‘why wasn’t it already illegal?’: President Trump last week signed two bills banning gag orders that stop pharmacists from alerting you to how you can pay less for a prescribed drug,” the [**_New York Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://nypost.com/2018/10/14/one-small-step-toward-lower-drug-prices/) editorial board writes. The editors add that this small step “should save some consumers hundreds of dollars a year” and is part of President Trump’s drive to lower drug prices.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjIzOTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjIyMzkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwOTM0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Tabitha Isner
subject: Trump-is-the-Best-President-Ever Healthcare
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Dear Friend,

Imagine for a moment what would happen if the Republican leadership in Congress put forward a plan for a health care overhaul. The proposal would allow every American to access quality, affordable healthcare. It would reward providers based on how well they keep patients healthy rather than paying them based on how many procedures they perform or prescriptions they dole out. It would build a pipeline of medical professionals in rural areas (like Southeast Alabama) and infrastructure for paying those professionals an adequate wage to stay in the communities that most need them. Imagine that the Republicans name it, "Trump-is-the-Best-President-Ever Healthcare."

A lot of Democrats would oppose it. They wouldn't want to give the Republicans that big of a win. They would fear what it would mean for their re-election campaigns. And they would oppose it simply because they oppose anything and everything that has Trump's name on it.

But I would co-sponsor it.

Because "Solutions Not Sides" means that I will put what's best for the people of southeast Alabama (and all of America) above partisanship, above my own political aspirations, above loyalty to the team. I will prioritize outcomes over ownership, people over party, results over rhetoric. I want solutions to the problems that plague our country, and I don't care who came up with the idea.

Does that mean I'm any less committed to finding solutions that are just, sustainable, and compassionate? No, it does not. Does it mean that I'll stop pushing for Paid Family Leave and affordable high-quality child care? No, it does not. Does it mean that I'll tolerate injustices against women, against black and brown folks, or against the LGBTQ community? No, it does not.

But we NEED healthcare.

We need leaders in this country who are SO committed to taking care of the people that they are actively looking for opportunities to build unexpected coalitions. We need leaders who are listening to the other side in hopes of hearing points of agreement rather than only listening for "gotchas." I believe it's the only way forward.

We need Solutions Not Sides! Donate $25 today!

Donate Now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2?emci=b48d027e-34d0-e811-af11-2818784f20f6&emdi=299e115a-89d0-e811-af11-2818784f20f6&ceid=6898985&am=&contactdata=GRAyRz4AvoZkAgGawuaDppCiAvIWaBB53YvMd87vgvcf0j%2BGz4fcqFgtGFxvODiO]

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Connect With Us:
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36106

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: 🚨 Alert - Post Hurricane Michael insurance scams 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6nevXNijloFi2ccbAI3rOsP2QzqaY3nWOyahbCn7Sc=/_-kPkw2kISfl855ULLAiH4cG0Pk4odfE950bxy7-13I=) Friends and Neighbors -- Hurricane Michael was a monster storm, one that has left much devastation and ruin in its wake. Now, our state and our neighbors are beginning the rebuilding process.

There are many good and charitable entities - such as **[the Red Cross](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6nevXNijloFi2ccbAI3rOsP2QzqaY3nWOyahbCn7Sc=/ZNsPaSoiFK34SKMPYuymD6w6kaJlMHdEodiY7fxwNqc=?cid=fy19hurmichael&med=cpc&source=google&scode=rsg00000e017&gclid=Cj0KCQjw6fvdBRCbARIsABGZ-vQtLM_osmeiU-iZPJRuArskhGsbSeW_9EqMuUw835mnkr6sey4HyuoaAoj5EALw_wcB&gclsrc=aw.ds&dclid=CIGg0Yit_90CFQnPZAodU24FhA)** \- who are lending a hand to those impacted by this terrible storm and for that, we are immensely thankful. But there are others out there who, unfortunately, do not have noble intentions - **and are looking to take advantage of the vulnerable after this catastrophic event.**

As we begin rebuilding after Hurricane Michael, **here are some helpful tips to ensure that we all steer clear of any insurance scams!: **
* Be an informed consumer
* Comparison shop
* Know your agent or broker
* Get proof of payment
* Get a copy of your policy
* Pay only for services you have received

**If you or a loved one have questions or concerns make sure to check out these websites for more information on who to contact!: **
* **[Federal Trade Commission](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6nevXNijloFi2ccbAI3rOsP2QzqaY3nWOyahbCn7Sc=/YeY7UBGgCOzik1OQOwC0yClScYAWYQbXBOGF_EuiIc4=)**
* **[Florida Department of Financial Services Division of Investigative and Forensic Services](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6nevXNijloFi2ccbAI3rOsP2QzqaY3nWOyahbCn7Sc=/KMvIQlY4guBt7mYgiYy-TGD1njmu9RXzOROImswzoho=)**
* **[The National Insurance Crime Bureau ](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6nevXNijloFi2ccbAI3rOsP2QzqaY3nWOyahbCn7Sc=/ZlmGBPFf1mUHSU2fbVGgdD5mbgcuPjCF3DbJX8c23Kc=)**
* **[The Florida Insurance Council](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6nevXNijloFi2ccbAI3rOsP2QzqaY3nWOyahbCn7Sc=/NpqiDaln9s6RLiXJe1zlYINKZjamEdHsJt-EyyxM8bU=)**

Thank you for all you do - **and please, stay safe out there!** **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

name: Team Maggie
subject: Republicans going all out in this key state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc198/2a380d31/31284c98/f16fac/1252434893/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc198/2a380d31/31284c98/f16fac/1252434893/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Democrats have a really tough race on our hands in Indiana -- **POLITICO has even called Joe Donnelly the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the country.**
Republicans have been going all-out to defeat Joe for a while, and ever since he voted against Brett Kavanaugh, they're doubling down. **With just weeks left before Election Day, the NRA just launched a major, multi-million dollar ad campaign to defeat Joe.**
[**Democrats in Indiana need your help to fight back -- will you please give $3 or more right now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc198/2a380d31/31284c98/f16fad/1252434893/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0ZG9ubmVsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAxNV9NV0g0RG9ubmVsbHkiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4donnelly?refcode=e20181015_MWH4Donnelly&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
If Joe's team fails to hit their fundraising goals, they'll have to start cutting pieces of their campaign plan. And cutting pieces could mean falling short on Election Day.
They're already running an incredibly frugal campaign, but the race for Indiana's Senate seat is going to be one of the most expensive in the country. If Democrats want to win, we can't afford for Joe's campaign to cut anything -- not the voter contact program, not the ad budget, and not the staff and organizers on the ground.
That's why we're reaching out now. With your help, Joe's team can fund their fight the right way and persevere no matter what the GOP throws at them. With just weeks left before Election Day, the NRA just launched a major, multi-million dollar ad campaign to defeat Joe. "" If Joe's team fails to hit their fundraising goals, they'll have to start cutting pieces of their campaign plan. And cutting pieces could mean falling short on Election Day. They're already running an incredibly frugal campaign, but the race for Indiana's Senate seat is going to be one of the most expensive in the country. If Democrats want to win, we can't afford for Joe's campaign to cut anything -- not the voter contact program, not the ad budget, and not the staff and organizers on the ground. That's why we're reaching out now. With your help, Joe's team can fund their fight the right way and persevere no matter what the GOP throws at them. name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: Democrats, Try Some Self-Restraint
body:
**Democrats, Try Some Self-Restraint**
_Will they keep pandering to their angry, radical base, or try to win over marginal Trump voters?_

The Wall Street Journal | Bobby Jindal

|
---
_Anti-Trump protestors dressed as handmaidens in Palm Beach, Fl., Jan. 20. PHOTO: JOE RAEDLE/GETTY IMAGES_
The energized base of the Democratic Party can’t seem to help itself. It may help President Trump win re-election.

It’s not certain that Democrats will retake the House, but if they do they will likely ignore their leaders’ preferences and push to impeach President Trump, or perhaps Justice Brett Kavanaugh. In a swap of Clinton-era positions, Democrats now lecture the nation that unseemly personal behavior makes the president unfit for office, while Republicans insist his private morality has no impact on his public duties. This is more than an arresting irony: Impeachment would undoubtedly energize Mr. Trump’s base and make these voters even more loyal to him—as it did with Bill Clinton.

Democrats have an alternative. They can set aside the precedent of the Obama years, when the party sought to enact the most extreme agenda it could pass, and instead search for common ground with marginal Trump voters. Democrats won’t win over his most ardent Tea Party members, evangelical Christians or other committed supporters. But a humbler, more open approach could attract some of his peripheral supporters and weaken the resolve of his base.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=9749&l=203&ctl=259ED:C15079EF2606CA7CC89BFB62B9910643696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7CC89BFB62B9910643696548644412C47B)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: tonight, I’m debating Rep. Brat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Tonight, Rep. Brat will be forced to face the facts and talk about the real issues at stake in this race, because we are facing off in our first and only debate.
| | Peter, This race is, and has always been, about the issues facing Central Virginia families. It's about access to affordable health care, growing our economy, and creating more job training opportunities for everyone in our district. You might not know this from the negative advertisements Rep. Dave Brat and his allies are running on television, which lean heavily on false statements and avoid the facts. **But tonight, Rep. Brat will be forced to face the facts and talk about the real issues at stake in this race, because we are facing off in our first and only debate.** I am looking forward to sharing my vision for improving our community at the debate tonight, Peter -- and it is heartening to know that I have this community of supporters standing behind me. The outpouring of support for our campaign has been overwhelming. _So, Peter, ahead of our debate tonight, I have a request for you:_ [**Will you help make today our campaign 's most successful day of grassroots fundraising yet, so that we can remind Rep. Brat that we are continuing to gain strength as we inch closer to Election Day?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/57aXglrrSCG2CmvbMO36cf2p0HTGCvg4iJtDZ7-38FA=/auX3e5b-e9ADTrb6BKNAbj7PxRljphZ41f80IXuc-PM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.15_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) My team has set a goal of [**200 grassroots contributions**](https://act.myngp.com/el/57aXglrrSCG2CmvbMO36cf2p0HTGCvg4iJtDZ7-38FA=/auX3e5b-e9ADTrb6BKNAbj7PxRljphZ41f80IXuc-PM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.15_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) before the debate begins, and I know we can reach it with your support. Thank you, as always. We will win this race together. Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/57aXglrrSCG2CmvbMO36cf2p0HTGCvg4iJtDZ7-38FA=/auX3e5b-e9ADTrb6BKNAbj7PxRljphZ41f80IXuc-PM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.15_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/57aXglrrSCG2CmvbMO36cf2p0HTGCvg4iJtDZ7-38FA=/auX3e5b-e9ADTrb6BKNAbj7PxRljphZ41f80IXuc-PM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/57aXglrrSCG2CmvbMO36cf2p0HTGCvg4iJtDZ7-38FA=/0TB06vZKVPLnqDRrOENBjvBEzFpIfcXYFf14ydNZt1s=)_

name: Greg Stanton
subject: taking back Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
A flood of campaign contributions from special interests is drowning out the voices of real people.

Passing campaign finance reform is the only way that we're going to _stop_ special interests from controlling Washington.

[**Will you add your name to our petition and demand Congress act?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lxhT2I45_TOy1XgUvCtb6rC1MQJpVHAx4olTUxUxxn8=/cBDqGV_PFE4z71GS3Bk9I6wDTpJ9K5ymRluBF1C5Hmw=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https%3A%2F%2Fsign.actiontaker.org%2FNew-Congress-Stanton-AB)

I have been endorsed by _ End Citizens United_ because I will fight this rigged system starting on my first day in office if elected.

Thank you for standing with me,

\-- _Greg_

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tomorrow’s policy is today’s vote.
body:
Peter,
In person absentee voting has started!
People of faith often throw away their votes citing the dilemma of choosing between flawed people who do not 100% represent our values.
**But _not_ voting is an even worse option—like burying your talent and neglecting your responsibility (Matthew 25:14-30). **
Your vote is a responsibly to be stewarded, just like your talents. Don’t bury it—allowing others to vote their values and decide yours.
Together, let’s be faithful stewards of the God-given responsibility we’ve been entrusted with—the duty to select our leaders and advance biblical principles with our votes.
**Are you ready to vote?**
* Visit the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOFyEyWP36N8WaX1ttOX9SDAWnOnK7b_RnvTl3ZqhjhEdg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015ipav01&n=1) to access a full sample ballot and voter guides to better understand the candidates on your ballot.
* And then **VOTE!**
* And share this email and the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOFyEyWP36N8WaX1ttOX9SDAWnOnK7b_RnvTl3ZqhjhEdg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015ipav01&n=2) with your friends and family to make sure they are ready to vote.

**Tomorrow’s policy is today’s vote!**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOFyEyWP36N8WaX1ttOX9SDAWnOnK7b_RnvTl3ZqhjhEdg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015ipav01&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015ipav01&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015ipav01&n=5).
clean_body: Peter, In person absentee voting has started! People of faith often throw away their votes citing the dilemma of choosing between flawed people who do not 100% represent our values. But not voting is an even worse option—like burying your talent and neglecting your responsibility (Matthew 25:14-30). Your vote is a responsibly to be stewarded, just like your talents. Don’t bury it—allowing others to vote their values and decide yours. Together, let’s be faithful stewards of the God-given responsibility we’ve been entrusted with—the duty to select our leaders and advance biblical principles with our votes. Are you ready to vote? Visit the to access a full sample ballot and voter guides to better understand the candidates on your ballot. And then VOTE! And share this email and the with your friends and family to make sure they are ready to vote. Tomorrow’s policy is today’s vote! United. We Stand.** Jason Yates CEO ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Today is the last day to register to vote in Virginia. Please open this before the window closes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, today is the last day to register to vote in Virginia.

I'm going to ask you to support our _Get Out the Vote Fund_ , which is currently supporting all of the work our organizers are doing on the ground to register voters in these final hours. **Can I tell you why this is so important?**

I've said it before and I'll say it again: It's not enough for us to win on Election Day. We need to make sure House candidates in Virginia win in a _big_ way. This is what will send the message we need to send in this country, at such an important time to send it. There are incredible women House candidates - Abigail Spanberger, Elaine Luria, Jennifer Wexton, Vangie Williams, Leslie Cockburn, and Jennifer Lewis - some of whom are mere points away from flipping traditionally Republican districts. Registering new voters in these districts could be the thing that turns the tables and closes the margins in their favor. Will you help us reach this critical goal before tonight when the window for Virginians to register to vote closes? **You can follow this link to see how far along we are in our goal and pitch in to help us meet it:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1009/3e0906/77ab8f91/3e37924c/1895224719/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline&source=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline")

What we do in these final hours on a campaign - the moments before a deadline to donate passes or the period to register closes - they speak volumes about who we are and what we choose to fight for.

My best,

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1009/3e0906/77ab8f91/3e379243/1895224719/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline&source=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline")
---

* * *
|
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1009/3e0906/77ab8f91/3e379247/1895224719/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline&source=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1009/3e0906/77ab8f91/3e379246/1895224719/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline&source=20181015_1_FR_TK_voter-reg-deadline")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. name: Bob Hugin
subject: almost 50 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
It’s been almost a half-century since New Jersey sent a Republican to the United States Senate. Now, we’re on the verge of making history. Can we... [ ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=6a535caa45d34989a8c42f7a874efbff&_e=0cxP9jlzLOcGtua7kCANkQCG2-LsbEeRbMNluoIQYFig_c6C__9djWZUUGpPwY_l4B_gPJhkRTqd2mGLyyjZ7cNn1p0s7OuUiV8ZCSLpOaTu53FaLrK5-DHTqLAEwtCznHexKh5RCTOl5qYPdrT2xcoxdolBp84MoZ0G1r77ALL_LbgYUZZFNjwoZEXtoh9emK_XoAerJhtCqmzG69Ga8l_Fa712FJ4G9-VpP-bUwgJ_1PvuHnPI1n6LMeGro5yQBr_9ZPr1VqgQMIJYXLF0FmIHZgwotbmRuCNUzLS5NFmJI6uZr0lz-ib4rnnsi65mCYl8Ffwuu5xGlJ5yvhPOo5PTLI1jdP9eaGmnlA_fKGQhp2ha-lfH0xCEBDJ1eDjvRRX6M2FC4lboLVwouBSYvHAZeZLypPm2RbA7Vcs1bu8%3D) | |
---
Peter,
**It’s been almost a half-century since New Jersey sent a Republican to the United States Senate. **

_Now, we’re on the verge of making history._

Can we count on you to help us make history on November 6?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Big Debate this Friday!
body:
** This will be big!
------------------------------------------------------------
Are you ready for the debate this Friday? I know that I am. Las time Tom Emmer got on stage and told people that our health care system is fantastic and retail workers are doing just fine in our economy. You and I both know that is simply not true. People are struggling to cover their care and cost of living and that truth will be clear again this Friday when I debate Tom Emmer live on MPR.

Tune in on Friday at 11 am to hear me and Tom Emmer talk about the issues the 6th district is facing. We created a facebook event page (https://facebook.com/events/1936936633027659/?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=906b138efa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_10_15_02_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-906b138efa-9291445) where we will share any updates.

You can show your support for our message by donating today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=mprdebate&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=906b138efa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_10_15_02_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-906b138efa-9291445) and sending a message that we want change!

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The real risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
I think we can't afford to sit back.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378bfe/7ab0e2c4/7e1e0e66/34987b90/3368303552/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10158A") Friend, In these last few weeks before Election Day, I can't help but think about one of my opponent's first ads after the primary: _"Maryland can't afford Ben Jealous."_ But from what I'm seeing in Maryland, folks can't afford to keep a Republican in the Governor's Mansion. We're falling behind, and Governor Hogan can't cover that up by attacking me. As Virginia, Pennsylvania, D.C., and Delaware get stronger, Maryland's getting weaker -- folks are paying more for less, and families are feeling the pinch. **So I don't think my plans to address the inequality and bring progressive change to our state are "too risky" -- I think Larry Hogan's plan to "go along to get along" is the real risk. Voters here in Maryland agree -- which is why Hogan and his special interest friends are determined to drown us out on the airwaves.** [**We are down to the wire here folks, and need to make sure our winning message is getting to voters. That is why we're going all-out to try to raise $50,000 by our FINAL mid-month deadline on Thursday. Will you donate $5 or more right now to fight back?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378bfe/7ab0e2c4/7e1e0e66/34987b90/3368303552/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10158A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378bfe/7ab0e2c4/7e1e0e66/34987b93/3368303552/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10158A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

subject: Eddie's Lakes Region Town Hall!
body:

That is why we are supporting Eddie. **His values and commitment to community are what New Hampshire needs.** A cornerstone of his campaign has been getting out and listening to Granite Staters all over the district, which is why Eddie wants you at his next town hall meeting. Here are the details: **A Commitment to Service: A Lakes Region Town Hall with Eddie Edwards.** Wicwas Grange 150 Meredith Center Road Meredith, NH 03253 6:30 PM We look forward to seeing you on Tuesday. clean_body: Derek, We have 22 days until a very important midterm election. Our friend, U.S Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards, understands what it means to put service before self. The momentum is on our side. Today, the Edwards for Congress team put out their first TV advertisement for the General Election! His background as a veteran and former police chief gives Eddie an appreciation for listening to his community on how to better serve. That is why we are supporting Eddie. His values and commitment to community are what New Hampshire needs. A cornerstone of his campaign has been getting out and listening to Granite Staters all over the district, which is why Eddie wants you at his next town hall meeting. Here are the details: A Commitment to Service: A Lakes Region Town Hall with Eddie Edwards. Wicwas Grange 150 Meredith Center Road Meredith, NH 03253 6:30 PM We look forward to seeing you on Tuesday. Team NHGOP | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Todd
subject: I'm sorry Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I feel like it’s only right to apologize to you for this in advance.
A supporter wrote and performed a song for J.D. Scholten called “ _Stand Tall for You and Me_.”
I first heard it about two weeks ago, and it’s been stuck in my head ever since.
**Honestly, I’d have to recommend that you don’t** [**_CLICK HERE_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2656011/16124366/-166741225?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2ZjYTU2MC1iM2QwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egP4ymLYQWjLYhyygzZsmILffWi3luIBUp3pFoU9rTA=).
Or on the video preview link below (that includes some candid footage of the only candidate in America who spends more time sleeping in WalMart parking lots in his Winnebago RV than he does in his own bed):
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2656012/16124367/-166741225?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2ZjYTU2MC1iM2QwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egP4ymLYQWjLYhyygzZsmILffWi3luIBUp3pFoU9rTA=)
This jingle will be playing soon on radio stations across the district.
And it will get stuck in your head!
If you choose to [**_CLICK HERE_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2656013/16124368/-166741225?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2ZjYTU2MC1iM2QwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egP4ymLYQWjLYhyygzZsmILffWi3luIBUp3pFoU9rTA=) (again, I’d advise against it), you’ll find yourself in the same place as everyone in our offices—hearing it in your head for the rest of the day.
**Again, I apologize, but there is a way to get back at us for putting this song in your head!**
[**_If you contribute today, we can put this radio jingle on air across the district and put this song in everyone else’s heads too!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2656014/16124369/-166741225?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2ZjYTU2MC1iM2QwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egP4ymLYQWjLYhyygzZsmILffWi3luIBUp3pFoU9rTA=)
Just make sure to apologize.
Standing Tall for All,
Todd Prieb
Deputy Campaign Manager

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
# **DEADLINE IS TOMORROW!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2656288/16125511/923597533?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNjYTE1OS1iNGQwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk1DLrlpP1abhnYY_MirVufrS6zHxuL3zA05Q0H54Zk=)
**Tomorrow is the last day to register to vote in West Virginia. We all know how important it is for West Virginians to vote in this election. The Republican Majority has taken aim at workers' rights, education, healthcare, social security and so much more. **
Like West Virginia teachers and school service personnel proved when standing up for their health care and wages, if we all stand up together we can make a difference for all West Virginians.
Please check your registration if you're registered already and register to vote if you're not. [You can do it online here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2656289/16125512/923597533?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNjYTE1OS1iNGQwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk1DLrlpP1abhnYY_MirVufrS6zHxuL3zA05Q0H54Zk=)
**Tomorrow is the deadline.**
Make sure your friends, families, and neighbors are registered too.
**Early Voting:** October 24th 2018 - November 3rd 2018
**Election Day:** Tuesday, November 6th

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

United States

name: Bob Corney, Team Bredesen
subject: What makes this deadline different
body:
|
#
Peter -- You’ve already gotten a few emails from us about this week’s fundraising deadline, so I wanted to make sure you knew what it was all about. **Beginning this Wednesday, Early Voting will open in Tennessee and voters will start heading to the polls to cast their ballots.** We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise as much support as we can before this week's final FEC fundraising deadline so we have the resources we’ll need to start getting out the vote and shaking off false attacks in the final weeks of this race. If we get the support we need, we’ll be able to fully supply the 24 field offices we’ve opened with Tennessee Victory and the volunteers working hard every day while we finish this race strong. That’s why I’m asking: **Will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can before our final FEC fundraising deadline to make sure we have the resources we need to win?** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | | | **[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2657077/16133044/502996468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDFmZTIzYS1iNWQwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAF2pyaV1SZVunZ2KAqdaAS-idoSvXMuMgTdsx2ZmqI=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181015-mm-5-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)**

clean_body: | Peter -- You’ve already gotten a few emails from us about this week’s fundraising deadline, so I wanted to make sure you knew what it was all about. Beginning this Wednesday, Early Voting will open in Tennessee and voters will start heading to the polls to cast their ballots. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise as much support as we can before this week's final FEC fundraising deadline so we have the resources we’ll need to start getting out the vote and shaking off false attacks in the final weeks of this race. If we get the support we need, we’ll be able to fully supply the 24 field offices we’ve opened with Tennessee Victory and the volunteers working hard every day while we finish this race strong. That’s why I’m asking: Will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can before our final FEC fundraising deadline to make sure we have the resources we need to win? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for taking the time to read this request -- we are so grateful to have you on our team. Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. body:

Friends - I'm about to walk into our budget meeting with Molly ahead of our campaign's most important deadline tonight at midnight.
**I really want to be able to share good news - but at this point, we're still a little shy of the $18,000 we need before midnight to keep this campaign on track.**
If we're going to defeat Chris Sununu and the right-wing corporate mega-donors fueling his campaign, we can't afford to fall short even one day between now and November 6.

**But Molly is refusing to accept a single dollar from corporate special interests, so she 's depending completely on grassroots supporters like you to help us close this gap.**
**We 're running out of time, and Molly is counting on us to dig deep. We're so close: [Please rush $5 or more right now to help us hit this goal, elect Molly in November and flip New Hampshire blue.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a34/d0ce7de/502607e3/9cda4a2/465842492/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTczLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk173-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Makaiah

name: Take Back The Senate
subject: can't miss this opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
**22 days left
to invest in this campaign**

[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
The clock is ticking, team. Here's what happened this weekend, and what to expect in the coming week: | 1) | Bob met with volunteers getting ready to **knock doors** and get out the vote for candidates running up and down the ballot. Winning these races is crucial to taking back Congress and building a better future for the middle class, and Bob is proud to join so many of his fellow Pennsylvanians in supporting those campaigns.
---|---
2) | Republicans are figuring out where they'll spend their money over the final three weeks. They're consulting fundraising reports, polling and the president's preferences to decide which candidates they're going to **attack** in the final days of this campaign.
3) | Bob's campaign manager is **finalizing the budget** for the rest of the race, and every extra dollar is going to getting out the vote on Election Day. She wants to put more ads on TV, buy digital advertisements and make additional investments in our organizing program, but how much money she can spend depends on what supporters like you do today.
**Pennsylvanians head to the polls in 22 days, and we're running out of time to make sure they turn out for Bob and other Democrats. What can you give to help mount the strongest possible campaign over the next three weeks?**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**

**[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks.

| Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d4f/51dbcc2a/1060db85/3ad2b79/617931205/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d4f/51dbcc2a/1060db85/3ad2b7a/617931205/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d4f/51dbcc2a/1060db85/3ad2b7b/617931205/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). clean_body: 22 days left to invest in this campaign "" The clock is ticking, team. Here's what happened this weekend, and what to expect in the coming week: | 1) | Bob met with volunteers getting ready to knock doors and get out the vote for candidates running up and down the ballot. Winning these races is crucial to taking back Congress and building a better future for the middle class, and Bob is proud to join so many of his fellow Pennsylvanians in supporting those campaigns. ---|--- 2) | Republicans are figuring out where they'll spend their money over the final three weeks. They're consulting fundraising reports, polling and the president's preferences to decide which candidates they're going to attack in the final days of this campaign. 3) | Bob's campaign manager is finalizing the budget for the rest of the race, and every extra dollar is going to getting out the vote on Election Day. She wants to put more ads on TV, buy digital advertisements and make additional investments in our organizing program, but how much money she can spend depends on what supporters like you do today. Pennsylvanians head to the polls in 22 days, and we're running out of time to make sure they turn out for Bob and other Democrats. What can you give to help mount the strongest possible campaign over the next three weeks? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks. | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

It's simple math: If we can get all our supporters to the polls, we win! name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: He told me to "shut the heck up." I didn't.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | A Republican once sent a message attacking me -- calling me "vile, unprofessional, despicable." He said I was "not a lady" and should "shut the heck up" because I had the nerve, the audacity to call him out for his misogyny. **Needless to say, I didn't shut the heck up -- I spoke out.** I will not be silenced, and neither will you. This November, I will do everything in my power to win and get Democrats elected up and down the ballot. [**With our mid-month deadline at midnight, can I count on you to help?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cbf/622b7b5b/1d247a78/307b6921/2825570558/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181014?refcode=dwse181014_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cbf/622b7b5b/1d247a78/307b6920/2825570558/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDE0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181014?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181014_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cbf/622b7b5b/1d247a78/307b6920/2825570558/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDE0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181014?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181014_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cbf/622b7b5b/1d247a78/307b6920/2825570558/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDE0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181014?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181014_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cbf/622b7b5b/1d247a78/307b6923/2825570558/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMDE0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181014?refcode=dwse181014_m_other&refcode2=861769")** I refuse to be silenced by anyone when it comes to speaking out for Florida families. When Republicans put the safety of our seniors at risk by attacking Medicare and Social Security, I fight back. When they attack the Affordable Care Act and threaten protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions, I fight back. Florida families count on me to get things done. I can't do that by being silent. [**Team -- don't sit silent. I know politics is frustrating right now. But if we don't take action, we can't achieve change. Rush in your contribution and help us reach this goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cbf/622b7b5b/1d247a78/307b6921/2825570558/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181014?refcode=dwse181014_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I'm not sure if you've tuned in to the Republican race for Senate in Wisconsin yet, but if you haven't, you should.

Friend,

I'm not sure if you've tuned in to the Republican race for Senate in Wisconsin yet, but if you haven't, you should.

Right now, nurse and military mom Leah Vukmir is facing a tough campaign against Wisconsin’s current do-nothing senator Tammy Baldwin. Time and time again, Baldwin has made it clear that she cares more about protecting her career than representing the values of her voters.

I’ve watched as Tammy Baldwin stood with the most radical members of the Senate to oppose tax reform for the middle class, block us from passing a budget, and friend, she even helped shut the government down earlier this year, which hurt our veterans and families!

There’s no doubt about it: Leah Vukmir is the only choice for Wisconsin families who want Washington to get things done! Raised in an immigrant family, Leah knows the value of hard work and the amazing opportunities we must protect in America. clean_body: I'm not sure if you've tuned in to the Republican race for Senate in Wisconsin yet, but if you haven't, you should. Friend, I'm not sure if you've tuned in to the Republican race for Senate in Wisconsin yet, but if you haven't, you should. Right now, nurse and military mom Leah Vukmir is facing a tough campaign against Wisconsin’s current do-nothing senator Tammy Baldwin. Time and time again, Baldwin has made it clear that she cares more about protecting her career than representing the values of her voters. I’ve watched as Tammy Baldwin stood with the most radical members of the Senate to oppose tax reform for the middle class, block us from passing a budget, and friend, she even helped shut the government down earlier this year, which hurt our veterans and families! There’s no doubt about it: Leah Vukmir is the only choice for Wisconsin families who want Washington to get things done! Raised in an immigrant family, Leah knows the value of hard work and the amazing opportunities we must protect in America. That's why I hope you’ll join me in supporting Leah by chipping in to make Leah the next senator from Wisconsin: Leah is not only an incredible patriot, but also a hard-working nurse who stands by her word. She got active in politics out of circumstance because her daughter wasn’t learning how to read in her kindergarten classroom. And I know Leah as a passionate mom will be focused on the important things: fighting for the middle class, bringing more jobs to America, keeping taxes low, and getting government out of your way. With Democrats energized to defeat conservatives this November, it's more important than ever to stand by our best candidates and make sure they win. It could be the difference between a Republican or liberal majority. Friend, no matter where you live in this great country, what happens in Wisconsin will impact you. Democrats know that if they win another term for Baldwin, they will have a shot at winning the majority. That's what makes this so important. It’s not going to be easy. The Democrats are determined to win it and are certain to pull out every trick in their book. They know the future of their party and movement depends on winning in Wisconsin -- and they will definitely be spending millions to ensure their victory. Wisconsin has the chance to take a stand for the entire Republican Party and help us KEEP the majority by electing Leah Vukmir. - But if conservatives stand together today and support Leah, I know she can win. Sincerely, Marco Rubio Paid for by Leah for Senate
