The White House • October 15, 2018
## Welcome home, Pastor Brunson!
##
##
**On Saturday,** President Donald J. Trump greeted Pastor Andrew Brunson in the Oval Office, shortly after the pastor’s release following two years of detainment in Turkey. “You have galvanized this country,” the President told him. **[Watch President Trump welcome Pastor Brunson home.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZSylQzlIhRo) **
## President Trump surveys hurricane damage
##
**As President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump** visit Florida and Georgia today, thousands of first responders and volunteers have mobilized to restore the communities hit hardest by Hurricane Michael. This storm of historic proportions has been met in turn with a massive Federal response. **Here’s a look at that response,** by the numbers:
* _A major on-the-ground operation:_ More than 16,000 Federal employees, including over 8,000 military personnel, have been deployed.
* _Search-and-rescue efforts underway:_ FEMA, the U.S. Coast Guard, and the National Guard are working alongside state responders and volunteers. As of this morning, they have completed 110 evacuations, 4,193 rescues/assists, 15,287 shelter-in-place checks, 128 animal assists, and 16,827 structural assessments.
* _Power restoration a top priority:_ More than 35,000 utility workers from 26 states are working to bring power back to impacted areas.
* _Food and water distribution:_ In Florida, FEMA has provided 715,000 meals and 1.5 million liters of water per day. FEMA has also transferred more than 350,000 meals to Georgia, and 30+ distribution sites are being supported.

**Over the weekend** , President Trump issued a [**major disaster declaration for Georgia**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-georgia-disaster-declaration-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and mobilized [**additional disaster assistance for Florida**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-amends-florida-disaster-declaration-3/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d). FEMA Disaster Survivor Assistance teams have been knocking on doors to help families register for support. So far, more than 28,000 individuals and households have registered for assistance. **“The response to Hurricane Michael continues,”** [**FEMA reports via Facebook**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.facebook.com/FEMA/?__tn__=kC-R&eid=ARAKf91_K9IEeC_5kTHIYUJ5SblHxyI5qLDDcXDq2TdeCjG_UgGYSUa7u3hmgec2lo0U5vf5KM_f5YG9&hc_ref=ARRms-mXF2ToMKrbLHwgcVWoOrr3WijOze4G_hXQjwB07KTOYGyG1EeDLblZwXoIQaA&fref=nf&__xts__%5b0%5d=68.ARBh5qEFa2G9ABmN3VOsDoEECz1zshAQOoFP0HHLb16BnT36XIQUQcS3y0Qc6qGaXfUFEpp5opWnQ6TE9GiY9qC0roGj8TiMTjtD8RlN8YRqLS3jiPc2-6lYnoZio5Yaiw_GqZ14XNr8SB7wsNS1wiNOrBwyfUe89Vj02Dk7uQK8LJUXtpKxef0). “Tens of thousands of industry workers continued restoring power and volunteers with many different organizations served hot meals and provided comfort.” **“We’ve called for maximum relief,”** President Trump said as he and the First Lady spent today meeting with first responders, volunteers, and families affected by the storm. When asked about his biggest priority for today’s trip, his answer was simple: “Just making sure everyone is safe, that they’re fed.” [**President Trump: Thank you to FEMA and our first responders.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1051954465438408704) **For updates:** [**See the latest on the Federal response to Hurricane Michael.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.fema.gov/hurricane-michael-lifelines)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump visit Florida after Hurricane Michael** | October 15, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE1Ljk2MjU0ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNS45NjI1NDg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxMjY0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Kimberly, Sherrod (2)
subject: re: I just got off the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I am so proud to work for Sherrod. On the debate stage last night, Sherrod's proven record of fighting for Ohio's working families was a clear contrast to multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, who only looks out for himself. Even worse, Renacci stooped to the gutter and used dirty tactics in an attempt to smear Sherrod's name -- and polls suggest his repeated attacks, smears, and lies may be working. Renacci is alarmingly unfit to be Ohio's next Senator and we have to do everything we can, Peter, to make sure that doesn't happen. [**We need to keep our TV ads on air, our digital ads running, and our field program strong. Can you chip in $5, $10, or match our online average contribution of $26 to help our campaign reach the finish line?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdb4/3021492490/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?refcode=sbe181015_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Contribute](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdb4/3021492490/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?refcode=sbe181015_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Thank you for everything you do,
Kimberly
_\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: I just got off the debate stage_
---
Peter --
I just got off the debate stage in Cleveland. Tonight was a powerful reminder of the stakes in this election.
While I'm fighting for hardworking Ohioans, my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, is only looking out for himself, the Trump White House, and the special interests.
[**The contrast in this race couldn 't be clearer. So I'm personally asking: Can you pitch in $5, $10, or match our average online contribution of $26 to help make sure we hit our Debate Day goal and defend this Senate seat?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdb4/3021492490/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?refcode=sbe181015_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdab/3021492490/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181015_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdab/3021492490/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181015_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdab/3021492490/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181015_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdb4/3021492490/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?refcode=sbe181015_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
I talk to hardworking Ohioans every day -- when I'm out grocery shopping with Connie, on a walk with the grandkids, or visiting a plant.
They are angry about decades of tax and trade policy rewarding corporations that shut down factories. They are angry that Washington cuts taxes for millionaires and then tells families they have to pay for it by taking cuts to their Social Security or working longer to get their Medicare.
And they have every right to be angry. Washington doesn't respect the dignity of work.**I do.**
That's why I'm so proud of this incredible grassroots team. It's not built by the special interests -- it's made up of everyday Ohioans like you, working hard to make this campaign a success in November. Your support energizes me every day.
[**23 days left. If you 're as fired up as I am tonight, chip in whatever you can.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeab/4462dc26/7cc74d24/201ffdb4/3021492490/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDE1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181015?refcode=sbe181015_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Jason Yates
subject: Any plans Sunday before the Elections?
body:
| | Mark your calendar!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayzyFsMC7WQyCzLMywZ2qTGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015com01&n=1)
| Peter, I want to encourage you to mark your calendars for a special event happening just two days before the historic midterm November elections. You’re invited to “The Event” a live broadcast with some of our nations leading Christian influencers – discussing the political issues central to our faith, and the best path forward for America. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayzyFsMC7WQyCzLMywZ2qTGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015com01&n=2)
**Sunday, November 4, 2018
****Join us for 90 Minutes**
**3pm PT | 4pm MT | 5pm CT | 6pm ET** My Faith Votes Honorary National Chairman, Governor Mike Huckabee, will speak along with our friend Bishop E.W. Jackson, and Mike Farris, President of Alliance Defending Freedom, the organization who represented Colorado baker Jack Phillips at the Supreme Court. **Watch from home, or better yet stream the event live at your church!** [Register to receive a reminder](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayyOFpQ7tXSmMPCeoDpu3I-T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015com01&n=3) about this free event. Join Christians across the country for this special simulcast as we come together to pray for our nation, and prepare to vote standing united for Biblical values in America! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayzyFsMC7WQyCzLMywZ2qTGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015com01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181015com01&n=5)

clean_body: | | Mark your calendar! | Peter, I want to encourage you to mark your calendars for a special event happening just two days before the historic midterm November elections. You’re invited to “The Event” a live broadcast with some of our nations leading Christian influencers – discussing the political issues central to our faith, and the best path forward for America. Sunday, November 4, 2018 Join us for 90 Minutes 3pm PT | 4pm MT | 5pm CT | 6pm ET My Faith Votes Honorary National Chairman, Governor Mike Huckabee, will speak along with our friend Bishop E.W. Jackson, and Mike Farris, President of Alliance Defending Freedom, the organization who represented Colorado baker Jack Phillips at the Supreme Court. Watch from home, or better yet stream the event live at your church! about this free event. Join Christians across the country for this special simulcast as we come together to pray for our nation, and prepare to vote standing united for Biblical values in America! United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

body:

**Polls show Claire behind so to be blunt, unless this grassroots community steps up to help Claire 's reelection, she'll lose and Democrats won't take back the Senate.**
[**Please help Claire fight back and hold on to this extremely vulnerable Senate seat by rushing $3 or more to her campaign right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc196/2a380d31/31249943/f16c2d/3218191139/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMTVfTVdINENNQ182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181015_MWH4CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Lindsay Coleman
subject: our last big FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We have one more big deadline before Election Day: Our very last Federal Election Commission deadline of the entire race is coming up in two short days. After the books close at midnight Wednesday, we
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e6a/1a8421e1/19aa40024/494461de/1663514672/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, It's hard to believe it, **but we 're only 22 days out from Election Day 2018.** But we have _one more big deadline_ before Election Day, team: **Our very last Federal Election Commission deadline of the entire race** is coming up in two short days. After the books close at midnight Wednesday, we'll send our last big fundraising report to the FEC. It's critical that we have a strong showing to win this race, and we have another **$7,000 to raise** to meet our goal. [**So, team, I 'm just going to come out and ask: Can you make a donation today to help us get there?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.15_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. I know our team emails you a lot, asking for your support in this race, and I want to thank you for staying with us. After all, Tom is the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the House, and winning this race is critical to our chances of taking back the House in November. This race is a must-win, for both Arizona families and for our country, and we can leave nothing up to chance.

[**Make a donation today to help us before the deadline if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.15_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Lindsay Coleman
Finance Director

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Tim Ryan Voter HQ
subject: Ohio early voting going on NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Early voting in Ohio is now open -- you can vote all this week, Monday through Friday, from 8am to 5pm at your County Board of Elections office. | |
---
Folks: Early voting in Ohio is underway! **You can vote in-person all this week, Monday through Friday, 8AM-5PM, at your county's Board of Elections office.** [Use IWillVote.com to find your early voting location now >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3000/1103310519/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") [Find out where to vote](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3000/1103310519/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") Here is the rest of the early voting scheduling in Ohio: • Monday, October 22-Friday, October 26, 8AM-5PM • Saturday, October 27, 8AM-4PM • Monday, October 29-Friday, November 2, 8AM-7PM • Saturday, November 3, 8AM-4PM • Sunday, November 4, 1PM-5PM • Monday, November 5, 8AM-2PM • ELECTION DAY, Tuesday, November 6, 6:30AM-7:30PM [Here's the full voting schedule for you to bookmark.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3003/1103310519/VEsF/ "https://www.sos.state.oh.us/elections/voters/voting-schedule/") Happy voting! \-- Team Ryan P.S. **Voting in Ohio should be much, MUCH easier!** But for too long, Republican elected officials have stood in the way of reform.** **[We can change that this November: Donate now to elect voting rights champions in Ohio.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3002/1103310519/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_cordray-clyde?refcode=em20181015_oh_ev_footer&tandembox=show&amount=20.18") [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3005/1103310519/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_cordray-clyde?refcode=em20181015_oh_ev_footer&tandembox=show&amount=20.18")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3004/1103310519/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3007/1103310519/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3006/1103310519/VEsO/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3009/1103310519/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3008/1103310519/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3004/1103310519/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9321/5486deaa/2bac3e91/dcf3007/1103310519/VEsHBw/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I’m counting on you, Peter
body:
| Peter, let me be frank: I don’t enjoy asking for money. But unlike my opponent, Congresswoman Blackburn, I’m not counting on the Washington Swamp to give us the resources we need to win this campaign. **I’m counting on you, Peter.** Let me explain where things stand, and why I’m asking for your help right now. Two days from now, early voting will open up in Tennessee and voters will begin casting their ballots. Election Day is only a few weeks later. **That means we have only a couple days left until we need to start activating our Get Out the Vote (GOTV) operation, and then only a few weeks left to win over undecided voters.** The donations we get from grassroots supporters like you ahead of Wednesday’s FEC fundraising deadline will be more critical to our campaign than at any other point in this race so far. **So even though I don’t like asking, I have to: can you add your donation of $10 or whatever you can so we can get out the vote and finish this race strong and win?** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | | | **[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2659986/16158924/502996468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWU1OTM5Ni1kMWQwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64pjtnB6ThLXaXGCr7RORTmn2d5bTTcW1gVM_OlBtpI=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181015-mm-6-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)**

subject: Your vote counts! Pledge to vote on November 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
Ohio's election is Nov. 6th, pledge to vote today to move Ohio forward! | | |
## [PLEDGE TO VOTE ON NOV. 6TH TODAY!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2lq/GkawqPtcQiiSsDfPNsbmWg/h0/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmJ7L4tpJvGFa-2FZnpP-2Bm6mjmlhZxzNfNHzGZDSDc5Y8wIS-2FmUYyqSyGhB5BvrGsf9R-2BlToOy4SL5CtYYf8foRQO-2Ff-2Fy4bQaE1z2Y3yYZT58zw-2F9hSXn-2Bw5RVRyMxLi7ZaY-2F6bdi7TXSsTC0MgZSFacFOgHSSaHqzqy7AzT4lkA7zAAOnATcNCLyXv86DOm8ljtUobCLTXqFAIRHbAv1Fcvo8OZvI2tTN5xdIw7MJsESrLI3F3JMvdKIfEgAT4jRuxlBLYNclaGddmY5CgU-2Fijw7fxGZ9GHIyQRBCrB0Q7M-2BcO0zmxKxVWGwE9uqumDCuYY-3D)

Dear Friend,

name: Jared Page
subject: Breaking: Senator Rand Paul to Rally for Attorney General Morrisey on Thursday!
body:
Friends,

I would like to personally invite you to a GOTV Rally with Senator Rand
Paul and Attorney General Patrick Morrisey this Thursday at 3pm. We are
excited about this exclusive opportunity to join two conservative leaders
for a rally. The event will take place at the SimEx Vinyl Extrusions (181
Pleasants Industrial Center St. Mary’s, WV 26170). To attend, please copy
and fill the link below. While a ticket does not guarantee admission, you
have to have a ticket to attend. We hope to see you there! Don't miss this
exciting opportunity!

Sincerely,

Jared

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Climate crisis -- here's my plan of action:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I'm prepared to take drastic action to fight climate change. Are you with me?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba13/2f5ea88d/749d0387/2cbc663a/3376030281/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Friend, From rising sea levels, to devastating droughts, to torrential storms, the IPCC report out of the United Nations last week makes it brutally clear that warming will make the world worse for us in the forms of famine, disease, economic tolls, and refugee crises. **But enough talk about disasters. What can we do about it? Here's the plan:**
* We must transform our economy: We'll reduce carbon pollution in our power and transportation sectors with new energy solutions and green infrastructure.
* We'll need to invest in developing and deploying clean energy technologies for the 21st century and create tens of thousands of jobs.
* We'll need to eliminate the unabated carbon pollution from coal-fired power plants.
* And we'll need our political leaders to take extraordinary action, starting right now.

[**It can all be done, friend, but we need to demand action from our political leaders. Will you chip in to help me hold them accountable to fighting climate change before it's too late?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba13/2f5ea88d/749d0387/2cbc663a/3376030281/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") There's no beating around the bush: Keeping warming to levels that limit global climate disasters will be very, very hard. But we have the science, the technology, and the financial means to make it happen. All we lack is the national political leadership to mobilize the unprecedented steps we must take to stabilize temperature rise, right now. **We can do it, but we need political leadership -- leaders who actually give a damn. So that's why I'm asking for your help; will you join me in the fight to power our climate movement right now?** | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba13/2f5ea88d/749d0387/2cbc663a/3376030281/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
---
Thanks for your help. Together, we can take the action we need to reduce our carbon emissions before 2030 and save our world from the worst impacts of climate change.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba13/2f5ea88d/749d0387/2cbc663a/3376030281/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-10-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba13/2f5ea88d/749d0387/2cbc6639/3376030281/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1-footer&refcode=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1-footer&utm_campaign=mid-month-1-footer&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Mandi Karp, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: It’s October 15, and you know what’s scary? There are only 3 weeks left until Election Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/KNw7qMjoghGUtUXTC0MNx4jcPLhMB-axe1W6P21XWtA=/oYgX7c4DY4ApAPHPea2qu8Btlus-cvNOWx2DFwxFOuY=?gpsid=37_57_4460&refcode=em18_181015_mm1_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_mm1_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Friend,

Ghouls. Monsters. Extraterrestrial invaders.

There's plenty to be frightened of in October, but none of those things are at the top of my list. That's because we're about three weeks away from Election Day. I'm scared we won't have enough time!

As this campaign's finance director, these final few weeks are the busiest for me. We need to hit our fundraising goals for Steve Sisolak now so we can execute our carefully coordinated get-out-the-vote plan in the days before November 6th.

**[Please chip in $5 or whatever you can right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KNw7qMjoghGUtUXTC0MNx4jcPLhMB-axe1W6P21XWtA=/oYgX7c4DY4ApAPHPea2qu8Btlus-cvNOWx2DFwxFOuY=?gpsid=37_57_4460&refcode=em18_181015_mm1_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_mm1_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

We can be sure that Laxalt's dark money allies will be dropping more attacks on Steve in the final weeks. So we need to build our war chest and be ready to fight back.

Polls as recent as last week show this race is still neck and neck. All eyes are on Nevada as one of the best opportunities to flip a governor's mansion in the nation. But our opponents and their special interest backers know it, too. And that's why we can't afford to fall short. Not now.

**[Help Steve rise above Laxalt's tricks. Chip in whatever you can today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KNw7qMjoghGUtUXTC0MNx4jcPLhMB-axe1W6P21XWtA=/oYgX7c4DY4ApAPHPea2qu8Btlus-cvNOWx2DFwxFOuY=?gpsid=37_57_4460&refcode=em18_181015_mm1_L2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_mm1_L2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thanks,

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/KNw7qMjoghGUtUXTC0MNx4jcPLhMB-axe1W6P21XWtA=/oYgX7c4DY4ApAPHPea2qu8Btlus-cvNOWx2DFwxFOuY=?gpsid=37_57_4460&refcode=em18_181015_mm1_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_mm1_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

name: Ed Rodriguez, AndrewGillum.com
subject: Everything was going well for the first nine months
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/2400545c/1298926961/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&source=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx")
Friends,

My name is Ed and when this photo was taken, I had just returned from Fallujah, Iraq.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/2400545f/1298926961/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4443&refcode=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2")
Right out of high school, I enlisted in the military, serving for five years as a Navy Corpsman embedded with the Marine Corps. I deployed to Iraq during my enlistment, where I provided frontline medical support to our troops during combat operations in Fallujah. After Fallujah, I finished out my enlistment, returned to my home state of Florida, and started college.

Everything was going well for the first nine months; but then, the unthinkable happened -- I was diagnosed with cancer.

Thankfully, I was able to access quality healthcare at the VA and received chemotherapy treatments that saved my life. It was a tough challenge getting healthy again, but I was able to beat cancer and return to school. I graduated from the University of Florida with a bachelor's degree, becoming the first person in my family to finish college.

As a veteran, an immigrant, a cancer survivor, and a first-generation college graduate, I know all too well that our state is filled with wonderful people. However, the policies that our elected leaders push for don't always work in service of those people. I'm so grateful for the help that I received, but I know not everyone has the same privileges.

That is why I am proud to support Andrew Gillum for Governor -- because he's a leader who grew up just like a majority of working Floridians and holds our same values. It's past time for our state to have a Governor that understands the struggles of everyday Floridians and is willing to fight for us to make sure we all have the resources we need to succeed in life.

Listen, this election is too important to sit on the sideline. We need every Floridian who cares about this state to help Mayor Gillum become our next Governor. **[If you're with us, chip in today to help bring it home in November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/2400545e/1298926961/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4443&refcode=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=3+-+If+youre+with+us+chip+in+today+to+help+b")**

Thanks,

Ed Rodriguez
Deputy Policy Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/24005451/1298926961/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4443&refcode=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Use of rank does not imply endorsement by the Marine Corps, Navy or the Department of Defense.

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/24005450/1298926961/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/24005453/1298926961/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&source=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366a/9e00690/50bdb5f0/24005452/1298926961/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx&source=em18_181015_EdR_fnd_gq_ful__ER_ettx")

It's past time for our state to have a Governor that understands the struggles of everyday Floridians and is willing to fight for us to make sure we all have the resources we need to succeed in life. Listen, this election is too important to sit on the sideline. We need every Floridian who cares about this state to help Mayor Gillum become our next Governor. "" Thanks, Ed Rodriguez Deputy Policy Director Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Use of rank does not imply endorsement by the Marine Corps, Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

Please join me this Wednesday, October 17 for a rally with the Family Research Council at Abundant Life Church in Fort Wayne. The Values Bus has been making stops across the country to promote the pro-family values that make our nation strong, and I'm proud to have the opportunity to support their efforts here in Indiana.

See below for details. I hope to see you there!

Working for you,

Jim

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Every time I talk to President Trump; he lets me know how important it is that we win. Peter,
My campaign manager has asked me to reach out to you. We have to send an update to the White House on the state of the race. Before I send the President our numbers, please donate to this effort.

Every time I talk to President Trump; he lets me know how important it is that we win. He has your support already, but he needs to remove obstructionists like Claire McCaskill if he is going drain the swamp in D.C. We cannot overcome the flood of liberal money coming into my opponent's coffers if you don't [step up right now and make your contribution](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7fb668b5a0c843ada5a1f03f6bacc4da&_e=e5cVnjd9AltD4IwiQNCCi00OcVAAbJMjlUCXfyxMcIQWL4F3g1FHL3VVjfIF2XHmN1QW7LcBES6i85iCc8VJ6ps_H5rzS7cYuS3JxyZnwcbszefT6A4YqJgizkS8W8gUqimaiTSacpFc7R2Pm3Ty9sjdZj6lls4CJixMWT4eXRwuyMqeTvpXAvDveaqLm7GNV-NtylCOrYfpdyrevk7pn5LMh9fG_ZhsPFioR7ktyM8zA9By9U9OKSgax_ctW2CawNt5TAiG5LNI9MNck7b6vb6O81sz1WW8rUBcKM78QOc%3D).

Thank you for your time,

Josh Hawley
Republican candidate for US Senate
Missouri \-------Forwarded Message-------

Subject: The White House is calling me

Kyle

name: me, Molly (2)
subject: important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Friends - quick note here: I'm coming up on a huge deadline, but I just heard from my team that we still need to raise another $3,600 by midnight to hit our goal.
Luckily, a group of generous donors has offered to match every gift, dollar for dollar, until tonight's deadline - because if we're going to win in New Hampshire, we simply cannot come up short.
**I'm running to put families like yours first, so - unlike Chris Sununu - I'm not taking any money from corporations. That's why this match opportunity is so crucial for us if we want to take back the corner office.**

name: Bob Casey
subject: big deadline -- can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d55/51dbcc2a/105084c7/3ad1cda/3047735252/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") This is important, team, and time is running out. Our final major Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline is on Wednesday, and we are still $8,400 short of our goal.

Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have come after me hard. President Trump even traveled to Pennsylvania last week, where he attacked me for supporting affordable health care, for seeing his corporate tax cut for what it really was and for refusing to support the most dangerous and divisive pieces of his agenda.

President Trump would like nothing more than to replace me with his hand-picked Senate candidate and good friend, Congressman Lou Barletta. Congressman Barletta already votes with the President 99% of the time, and he's made it clear that he's running to help the President, not working families here in Pennsylvania. If we lose this seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. We can't let that happen, team.

With only 22 days to go and our last major deadline just a few days away, it has never been more important to make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to win. That means that today, we need every grassroots supporter to do whatever they can to push toward the finish line. **Will you donate $5 (becomes $10) or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat?**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

I really appreciate you coming through at this critical time.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: My vision for the 7th District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress |
body:
Good evening, my friends!

Tonight at the VA07 Debate in Culpeper, I had the unique opportunity to share my vision for a stronger, more prosperous District and Commonwealth. Before a large, energetic crowd at Germanna Community College, and an audience watching on screens across Central Virginia, I spoke about my common-sense positions on healthcare, the economy, education, the workforce, and public safety, issues of central importance to the residents of the 7th District.

I was honored to discuss the need for accessible, responsible leadership with people watching all across the state. Tonight, viewers saw and heard two very different visions for the 7th District: my vision for a unified district focused on common-sense policies that provide our citizens with the opportunity to thrive, and one focused on divisive rhetoric and even more divisive policies. I was excited to share my optimistic vision tonight, and it’s the one I plan to take to Congress.

Unfortunately, Congressman Brat couldn’t help himself during tonight’s debate when he repeated many of the same inaccurate statements and misleading accusations regarding my record and positions. That is why my campaign released a list this morning which included Brat’s incorrect claims, my actual positions, and in-depth citations.

Nevertheless, I believe our message resonated with people all across the District; with the single-parent household fighting to make ends meet; with the recent college graduate struggling under the weight of student-loan debt; with the senior desperately trying to afford prescription drugs; with the families and individuals eager to live in a district that is more equitable, more competitive, and more prosperous.

Thank you for your support leading up to this debate and for your help in making this grassroots campaign the incredible force for positive change that it has become. I look forward to serving the people of the 7th District when I’m elected to Congress.

Sincerely,

Abigail Spanberger

I was honored to discuss the need for accessible, responsible leadership with people watching all across the state. Tonight, viewers saw and heard two very different visions for the 7th District: my vision for a unified district focused on common-sense policies that provide our citizens with the opportunity to thrive, and one focused on divisive rhetoric and even more divisive policies. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
One week from today, Donald Trump Jr. is coming to Indiana. And this is your chance to join him! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/rally-with-donald-trump-jr?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **Rally with Donald Trump Jr. & Kimberly Guilfoyle!**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1d91254c3f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Stand with Donald Trump, Jr.!** **Join him next Monday for a rally in Indiana!**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=221fe9976d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Friend,

One week from today, _**Donald Trump Jr. is coming to Indiana**_ for a stop on the [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=179519be03&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
[**And this is your chance to join him!**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1112a9a69e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Just days ahead of this year's historic midterm election --_and with early voting already underway_ \-- Donald Trump Jr. is coming to Indiana because Hoosier voters have the power to determine who leads the U.S. Senate.

Will it be obstructionist Democrats, who are trying to block President Donald Trump's agenda? Or will it be Republicans, who are working with President Trump to shake up business-as-usual in Washington?

**Join Donald Trump, Jr. and America First Action PAC vice chairwoman Kimberly Guilfoyle for a rally in Greenfield supporting conservative businessman Mike Braun, Indiana's next U.S. Senator and a true ally for President Trump!**
**WHERE:**
Indianapolis Regional Airport (formerly known as Mt. Comfort Airport)
3867 N Aviation Way
Greenfield, IN

**WHEN:**
Monday, October 22
Doors open at 2:30 p.m.
Rally begins at 4 p.m.
[RSVP now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b42f0a6661&e=1acd9bb3d6), and reserve your spot at this rally. Donald Trump Jr. is telling us he can't wait to get back to Indiana, and we want to make sure that he sees you there!

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
| [RSVP Now: Stand With Donald Trump, Jr!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e9cd5283f1&e=1acd9bb3d6 "RSVP Now: Stand With Donald Trump, Jr!")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c562e7746&e=1acd9bb3d6)

---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd7ffe1b3f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Mike Braun is appearing at this event as a special guest and is not soliciting funds or donations.

name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: want to make sure you saw this
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005591/2405997963/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&source=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd")
Friends,

As widely covered in the news, Hurricane Michael left many parts of North Florida devastated.

We know we're stronger when we stand shoulder-to-shoulder with our neighbors -- so that's exactly what we're doing here at the Gillum-King campaign. We are ALL in this TOGETHER.

We've set a goal to raise $20,000 for nonprofits to help Floridians who are going to be rebuilding their homes and communities for weeks and months to come. The Gillum-King campaign will match funds raised in this effort -- dollar-for-dollar -- to help raise at least $40,000 for this important cause. **[So, if you can, please donate here now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005590/2405997963/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+So+if+you+can+please+donate+here+now")**

Together, we can rebuild our state.

Thank you,

Brandon Davis
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005593/2405997963/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Gillum
Date: Sun, Oct 14, 2018 at 2:11 PM
Subject: Help us rebuild, friend.

Hello --

The aftermath of Hurricane Michael left many parts of North Florida devastated. But here in the Sunshine State, we stick together and help our neighbors in times of need.

Throughout the past week, we've opened up our offices to accept supplies and the response has been overwhelming -- and we need your help to keep the momentum going.

**[We're teaming up with relief organizations on the ground and have set a goal to raise $20,000 for these non-profits to help those in need -- will you join us? Your donation will be matched.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005592/2405997963/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Were+teaming+up+with+relief+organization")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005595/2405997963/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5")
---

We're stronger when we work together, and we can make an impact to help our neighbors get back on their feet. **[Help us hit our goal to raise $20,000 and your donation will be doubled.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005594/2405997963/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=6+-+++Help+us+hit+our+goal+to+raise+20000+an")

** Together, we can rebuild Florida.

Bring it home,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005597/2405997963/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=7+-+DONATE")

P.S. If you'd like to send supplies to those in need, find a list of what you can drop off at our offices [here](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/24005596/2405997963/VEsO/ "https://andrewgillum.com/2018/10/hurricane-michael-how-you-can-help/?gpsid=9_55_4420&source=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd"). We will then work with relief organizations to get those supplies delivered to Floridians in need.

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366d/9e00690/508ca1b7/240055a9/2405997963/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=9+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181015_HMRKicker_fnd_gq_ful__bd"). name: M. Kelly
subject: President Barack Obama knows:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
I need you right now, friends.
My campaign is facing out-of-state attack ads from dark money groups like the Koch brothers' network, who are dead-set on defeating me and keeping their friend Chris Sununu in office.
**President Barack Obama knows that, unlike Chris Sununu, I 'll be a governor who works to create opportunities for every Granite Stater - not just the wealthy few. **I couldn't be more honored to have his support - but now, I need yours too.
Our most important fundraising deadline of the cycle is tonight, and we're nearly there. But nearly there isn't going to cut it - we need raise another $1,500 tonight.

**And since I 'm refusing any donations from corporate special interests, I'm depending on grassroots donors like you to rush an immediate contribution tonight. Please help us hit our crucial goal, win in November and defeat Chris Sununu's corporate agenda.**
**Friends, time is running out: [_Will you rush $5 or more right now - every dollar you can spare - to stand with President Obama and help us win in November?_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a36/d0ce7de/502b6597/9cda76c/2492743475/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk165-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Molly

name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: this is what's on the ballot on Nov 6:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d5b/51dbcc2a/10414924/3ad160e/3625907704/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team -- you know how important this election is.

Everything we care about is on the ballot. This administration has come after affordable health care, workers' rights, voting rights and programs that provide for our seniors, like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. There is too much at stake to sit on the sidelines on November 6.

**_[Can Bob count on you to fight back? Show your support and donate $5 or more today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181015_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Throughout his career, Bob has put Pennsylvanians' priorities above all else. When this administration gave a tax cut to the top 1% at the expense of middle-class Americans, he fought back with two fists up. When Congressional Republicans announced plans to make up the budget deficit by slashing programs like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, Bob said no way. He fights for what's right for all Pennsylvanians.

**With everything at stake this year, we need to keep Bob's voice in the Senate. Can you rush $5 or more to protect Bob?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. clean_body: "" Team -- you know how important this election is. Everything we care about is on the ballot. This administration has come after affordable health care, workers' rights, voting rights and programs that provide for our seniors, like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. There is too much at stake to sit on the sidelines on November 6. "" Throughout his career, Bob has put Pennsylvanians' priorities above all else. When this administration gave a tax cut to the top 1% at the expense of middle-class Americans, he fought back with two fists up. When Congressional Republicans announced plans to make up the budget deficit by slashing programs like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, Bob said no way. He fights for what's right for all Pennsylvanians. With everything at stake this year, we need to keep Bob's voice in the Senate. Can you rush $5 or more to protect Bob?
